cards.name: 8 of Cups, reversed
cards.interpretation: stagnation, monotony, accepting less, avoidance, fear of change, staying in bad situation

cards.name: Page of Wands, reversed
cards.interpretation: hasty, impatient, lacking ideas, tantrums, laziness, boring, unreliable, distracted

cards.name: King of Cups, reversed
cards.interpretation: overwhelmed, anxious, cold, repressed, withdrawn, manipulative, selfish
